question:
What makes "toxic positivity" unhelpful to someone experiencing grief?
A) It makes the grieving person laugh too much.
B) It invalidates their genuine pain and pressures them to suppress negative emotions rather than processing them.
C) It is highly radioactive.
D) It forces the grieving person to forget who they lost entirely.
